infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: FindMyMaid uses your location to sort helpers by distance and to set your service area when you create a helper profile.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Choose a clear photo for your helper profile.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Take a photo for your helper profile.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow FindMyMaid to select your profile photo.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow FindMyMaid to take your profile photo.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: FindMyMaid uses your location to show nearby helpers and to place your helper profile when you sign up.
